question: I want to forecast 2m temperature and 10m wind speed 3 days ahead from 2024-01-15 00Z. I have an A100 80GB GPU. Write me the full inference script.
ground_truth: Selects a suitable medium-range prognostic model, a compatible data source, calculates nsteps, and generates a complete deterministic inference script. Output should closely match the reference target file.
expected_behavior: Selects a medium-range (MR class) prognostic model appropriate for 3-day forecasts
Presents data source options and selects one compatible with the chosen model
Correctly calculates nsteps based on model time step and 3-day horizon
Generated script uses earth2studio.run.deterministic with correct arguments
Script includes output_coords filtering to t2m, u10m, and v10m variables (both wind components needed for wind speed)
Generated script closely matches the structure in evals/targets/eval_1_target.py

question: Generate a deterministic forecast script using GraphCast with ARCO ERA5 data. Initialize from 2023-09-01 00Z and run for 10 days. Save all output variables to Zarr.
ground_truth: Generates a script using GraphCastOperational model, ARCO data source, ZarrBackend, 10-day run. Does not filter output_coords (saves all model outputs).
expected_behavior: Uses GraphCastOperational or GraphCast model class
Uses ARCO data source
Uses ZarrBackend for IO
Correctly calculates nsteps for 10 days with GraphCast's time step
Does not include output_coords filtering (saves all variables)
Generated script closely matches the structure in evals/targets/eval_4_target.py

question: I want to build a deterministic forecast workflow from scratch without using earth2studio.run.deterministic. Write a complete script that manually fetches initial conditions, creates the model iterator, steps through it, and writes each step to the IO backend. Use Pangu for a 5-day forecast of z500 and t2m from 2024-03-01 00Z with GFS data and ZarrBackend output.
ground_truth: Generates a complete script that reimplements the deterministic workflow loop manually: fetches data with fetch_data, sets up IO coordinates, creates the prognostic iterator, loops through steps writing output via split_coords, and uses map_coords for coordinate subsetting. Does NOT call earth2studio.run.deterministic.
expected_behavior: Does NOT import or call earth2studio.run.deterministic
Uses fetch_data from earth2studio.data to fetch initial conditions onto the device
Calls prognostic.create_iterator(x, coords) to create the model iterator
Iterates through the model with a for/while loop, breaking at nsteps
Uses map_coords to subselect output variables/coordinates at each step
Uses split_coords before writing to the IO backend
Correctly sets up IO total_coords with time and lead_time arrays before the loop
Calls io.add_array to initialize the IO backend before writing
Correctly calculates nsteps=20 for 5 days with Pangu's 6h time step
Generated script closely matches the structure in evals/targets/eval_7_target.py
